---
title: "König"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-k-nig">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



## Übliche Form

[Titulatur] + [Name] + [Epitheta]


## Titulatur

<div class='tableFixHead table-wide table-resizable'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Bezeichnung </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> WB </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Kommentar </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Horusname<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400034' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400034' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400034 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400034</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/01_Horusname_01/0001_Hr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/01_Horusname_01/0010_Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/01_Horusname_01/0020_Hr_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/01_Horusname_01/0030_Hr_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/01_Horusname_01/0040_Hr_D.19_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.19)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/01_Horusname_01/0050_Hr_D.19_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.19)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> III: 124 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herrinnenname<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400065' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400065' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400065 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400065</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/02_Herrinname_01/0001_nbty_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/02_Herrinname_01/0010_nbty_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb.ty* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> II: 233 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Goldhorusname<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400069' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400069' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400069 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400069</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/03_Goldhorus_01/0001_Hr-m-nb.w_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr n nbw* / *bik n nbw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> II: 240; I: 445 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Umschrift und Übersetzung konventionell </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Thronname<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/88060' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 88060' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 88060 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>88060</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0001_nsw-bit_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0010_nsw-bit_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0020_nsw-bit_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0030_nsw-bit_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0040_nsw-bit_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0050_nsw-bit_NR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0060_nsw-bit_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0070_nsw-bit_Gr_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0080_nsw-bit_Gr_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0090_nsw-bit_Gr_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nsw-bit* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> II: 330 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Eigenname<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/126020' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 126020' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 126020 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>126020</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_01/0001_sA-ra_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_01/0010_sA-ra_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_01/0020_sA-ra_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_01/0030_sA-ra_D.20_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.20)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_01/0040_sA-ra_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_01/0050_sA-ra_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣ rꜥ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> III: 440 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Name

siehe: Beckerath, Jürgen von 1999. Handbuch der ägyptischen Königsnamen. Münchner Ägyptologische Studien 49; Münchener Universitätsschriften, Philosophische Fakultät für Geschichts- und Kunstwissenschaften. Mainz: Philipp von Zabern.


## Epitheta

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nṯr nfr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/90390' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 90390' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 90390 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>90390</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/01_nTr-nfr/0001_nTr-nfr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> vollkommender Gott </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb tꜣ.wi*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400038' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400038' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400038 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400038</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/02_nb-tA.wj/0001_nb-tA.wj_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr der beiden Länder </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣ⸗f n ẖ.t⸗f*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/125510' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 125510' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 125510 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>125510</a><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/113110' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 113110' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 113110 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>113110</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/03_sA=f-n-X.t=f/0001_sA=f-n-X.t=f_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> sein leiblicher Sohn </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥm⸗f*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/104690' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 104690' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 104690 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>104690</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/04_Hm=f/0001_Hm=f_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Seine Majestät </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥm*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/104690' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 104690' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 104690 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>104690</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/05_Hm/0001_Hm_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/05_Hm/0010_Hm_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/05_Hm/0020_Hm_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Majestät </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nsw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/88040' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 88040' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 88040 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>88040</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/06_nsw/0001_nsw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/06_nsw/0010_nsw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/06_nsw/0020_nsw_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> König </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb ḫꜥ.w*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/600260' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 600260' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 600260 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>600260</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/07_nb-xa.w/0001_nb-xa.w_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr der Erscheinungen/Kronen </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
